name: harness-lab
description: AI 项目的研发治理层模板

scripts.lint: node -e "console.error('Bind a real lint command for the target project before using Harness Lab.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.test: node -e "console.error('Bind a real test command for the target project before using Harness Lab.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: node -e "console.error('Bind a real build command for the target project before using Harness Lab.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.verify: node -e "console.error('Bind a real verify command, or document the equivalent validation chain, before using Harness Lab.'); process.exit(1)"
